body_txt: So you're a prankster or villain whose prank or Evil Plan has been exposed. Everyone is giving you a Death Glare , and you know you're in serious trouble . What do you do? You put on a big smile to save a little face. The more disgraceful or outright evil your plan was, the more likely this is to fail, and for Laser-Guided Karma to come a-knockin'. The Not-So-Innocent Whistle is an alternative to this kind of situation. Broken Smile may overlap if the smile starts as genuine. Related to Cheshire Cat Grin .
